body.title: Delete old inference proxy stack (proxy.py, rules.py, model_option.py, provider.py)
body.result: Dick deleted all 5 files (proxy.py, rules.py, model_option.py, provider.py, test_runtime_model_selection.py). Verified absent. 217 tests passed. Closed retroactively after double-dispatch artifact left ticket in acked state.
body.intention: I intend that the dead three-stack proxy code is removed, leaving devices/inference/ with a single routing system (InferenceDevice + RulesEngine + sources) and no ambiguous human= parameter.
body.description:
devices/inference/ contains two inference routing systems: the live one (InferenceDevice + RulesEngine + sources.py) and a dead three-stack system (proxy.py, rules.py, model_option.py, provider.py). The old stack's public API (inference_call, get_proxy, ModelOption, BaseProvider, etc.) has zero callers outside inference/ itself. Its 'human=' routing parameter is superseded by InferenceRequest.foreground=True. Only test_runtime_model_selection.py exercises this stack.

Delete the dead files and their test. Update devices/inference/__init__.py to export only the live stack.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/proxy.py, devices/inference/rules.py, devices/inference/model_option.py, devices/inference/provider.py, devices/inference/__init__.py, tests/inference/test_runtime_model_selection.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no TheIgors imports
**Scope boundary:** IN: delete the four dead modules + their test + clean up __init__.py exports. OUT: any changes to the live stack (device.py, rules_engine.py, sources.py, shim.py).
**Completion criteria:** (1) The four files are deleted; (2) devices/inference/__init__.py no longer exports ModelOption/BaseProvider/InferenceProxy/get_proxy/inference_call; (3) test_runtime_model_selection.py is deleted; (4) all remaining inference tests pass; (5) pip install -e . succeeds.
